basic_details.job_title: JKSSB Divisional/District Cadre Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 194 Veterinary Pharmacist, Assistant Compiler Posts
basic_details.post_name: Veterinary Pharmacist (Agriculture Production Dept.) & Assistant Compiler (Finance Dept.)
basic_details.short_information: Important Note: Candidates must possess a valid Domicile Certificate of J&K issued on or before the cut-off date (19.05.2026). Reservation shall be applicable as per J&K Reservation Rules.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification (Post-wise): | Veterinary Pharmacist (All posts under Agriculture Production Department): B.Sc from a recognised university having Zoology as one of the subjects. Assistant Compiler (Finance Department): 10+2 from a recognised Board. | Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026):

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Level-4 (Rs.25,500 – 81,100) for all advertised posts.

selection_process: The selection will be based on Written / OMR Examination only.

Objective Type Multiple Choice Questions. Negative Marking: ¼ of marks assigned to the question. Syllabus will be notified separately on the official website. Final selection on the basis of merit obtained in the Written/OMR Examination.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must apply online through the official JKSSB portal before the last date.
Step 1 – Visit www.jkssb.nic.in and click on the relevant advertisement link.
Step 2 – Register using valid email ID and mobile number.
Step 3 – Fill the online application form carefully, upload required documents (photograph, signature, category certificate, qualification certificates).
Step 4 – Pay the application fee online.
Step 5 – Submit the form and take printout for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is JKSSB Advertisement No. 03 of 2026 Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: JKSSB Advertisement No. 03 of 2026 is a recruitment notification issued by Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board for 194 Divisional and District Cadre posts of Veterinary Pharmacist in Agriculture Production Department (Animal Husbandry) and Assistant Compiler in Finance Department (J&K Funds Organisation).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in JKSSB Advt 03 of 2026?
faq.answer: Under JKSSB Advertisement 03 of 2026, a total of 194 vacancies have been notified, out of which multiple posts are for Veterinary Pharmacist in Animal Husbandry Jammu & Kashmir and 48 posts (27 + 21) are for Assistant Compiler in J&K Funds Organisation.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for JKSSB Advertisement 03 of 2026?
faq.answer: The online application form for JKSSB Advt No. 03 of 2026 will be available from 20 April 2026 and the last date to submit the application form is 19 May 2026 through the official website jkssb.nic.in.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts are advertised under JKSSB Advt No. 03 of 2026?
faq.answer: JKSSB Advertisement 03 of 2026 includes Divisional and District Cadre posts of Veterinary Pharmacist in Agriculture Production Department (Animal Husbandry Jammu/Kashmir) and Assistant Compiler in Finance Department (J&K Funds Organisation).

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for JKSSB Veterinary Pharmacist under Advt 03 of 2026?
faq.answer: For Veterinary Pharmacist posts, candidates must possess a B.Sc degree from a recognised university with Zoology as one of the subjects and must be a domicile of Jammu & Kashmir as on the cut‑off date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification for JKSSB Assistant Compiler posts?
faq.answer: For Assistant Compiler posts in J&K Funds Organisation, candidates should have passed 10+2 from a recognised Board of School Education along with a valid domicile certificate of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for JKSSB Advertisement 03 of 2026 recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit as on 01 January 2026 is 18 to 40 years for Open Merit (OM) category, 18 to 43 years for reserved categories like SC, ST, RBA, ALC/IB, EWS and OBC, 18 to 42 years for Physically Challenged candidates and up to 48 years for Ex‑Servicemen, as per JKSSB norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for JKSSB Advt 03 of 2026 online form?
faq.answer: The application fee for JKSSB Advertisement No. 03 of 2026 is Rs. 600 for General/Open Merit candidates and Rs. 500 for SC, ST‑1, ST‑2, EWS and PwBD candidates, payable through online mode only.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for JKSSB Veterinary Pharmacist and Assistant Compiler 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for JKSSB Advt 03 of 2026 is based on a written/OMR‑based objective type examination with multiple‑choice questions and negative marking of one‑fourth of the marks assigned to each question, followed by document verification and preparation of merit list.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download JKSSB Advertisement 03 of 2026 notification PDF and apply online?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the official JKSSB Advt No. 03 of 2026 notification PDF and submit the online application form only through the official website of Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board at jkssb.nic.in within the prescribed dates.
